abstract: An AI agent skill that orchestrates ast-grep, code-review-graph (MCP), Codemod, and bundled fallback scripts to move code intelligence from probabilistic (text-based grep/read) to deterministic, measurable navigation and editing. Contains 8 rule categories: structural discovery, dependency tracing, surgical execution, graceful fallback, auto-install, multi-tool strategies, state ownership mapping, and recall-aware benchmarking. Includes a runnable harness, fixtures, and evaluation criteria so token savings are reported with recall, precision, false negatives, and false positives.
